title: 7 Herbal Teas For Chronic Bronchitis
description: Rosmarinus officinalis teas contains rosmarinic acid, a powerful antioxidant that helps to reduce inflammation in the airways. This property is beneficial for people with chronic bronchitis, as it can help to soothe and calm the irritated tissues. Additionally, rosmarinic acid has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to combat infections and reduce congestion. The carnosic acid and ursolic acid in Rosmarinus officinalis teas also have anti-inflammatory effects...
